introSection: Bayou Express is a steel kiddie roller coaster currently located at Le Fleury in Wavrechain-sous-Faulx, Hauts-de-France, France.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
The coaster originally opened at Tivoli Gardens in 1999, it was named Karavanen during its time there. It would continue to operate until 2018, after which it would be taken down and shipped to France. The Zierer build kiddie roller coaster Kamelen would take its place.

Karavanen would reopen at Le Fleury in August of 2020, now dawning the name Bayou Express.

sections.title: Colour scheme
sections.content: Red track and black supports. The coaster used to feature sand-yellow track and unpainted supports.

fullText:
Bayou Express is a steel kiddie roller coaster currently located at Le Fleury in Wavrechain-sous-Faulx, Hauts-de-France, France.

The coaster originally opened at Tivoli Gardens in 1999, it was named Karavanen during its time there. It would continue to operate until 2018, after which it would be taken down and shipped to France. The Zierer build kiddie roller coaster Kamelen would take its place.

Karavanen would reopen at Le Fleury in August of 2020, now dawning the name Bayou Express.



Red track and black supports. The coaster used to feature sand-yellow track and unpainted supports.
